creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Oops, sorry, but I didn't notice this PR and have added a p4db port of my own. 

Please feed me back anything that can improve the stock port (devel/p4db) 
so I can merge your effort.  Optionally, you can take over the maintainership. 
Thanks.
